summary: A short, silent looping animated GIF of President Trump doing his signature fist-pump dance at an outdoor event, posted as a 'That Friday feeling' reaction meme about wages and prices. It is raw event footage repurposed as a GIF with no audio, music, or cinematic production.
notable_text: No on-screen text in the GIF; tweet text 'That Friday feeling when wages are going up and prices are coming down for American workers'.
